docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZENDEJAS, KORYNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NELNET PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH HER CLAIM OF A BROKEN AGREEMENT TO REMOVE DEROGATORY INFORMATION FROM HER CREDIT REPORT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY ZENDEJAS, KORYNA AS TO DEFENDANT NELNET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT NELNET
DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT NELNET

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINITFF KORYNA ZENDEJAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NELNET IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JILL WARNER., APPEARING BY COURTCALL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILED SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY DEFENDANT NELNET AS TO PLAINTIFF ZENDEJAS, KORYNA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY ZENDEJAS, KORYNA NELNET
